meaning: n.<澳口>胶姆糖,口香糖,橡皮糖
examples: In the early draft scripts of Star Wars, Wedge was a young human pilot named "Chewie."
Chewie is very special to a lot of people, and especially to me.
Chewie, Barnabas, Hannah and others will be visiting schoolchildren, attending funerals and memorial services, and will be at the memorial area.
